question: B-003-trust-promotion
claim: Two gates that never trade off: distinct-count k>=2 AND posterior>=threshold; substrate REFUSES a policy whose threshold its own k can never reach. The exact missing C4 gate — estimator emits a proposal (weight/threshold deltas) but autoPromotion:false and NO gate consumes it.

question: B-003-trust-promotion
claim: Unscored contributors emit the uninformative 0.5 (moves posterior toward neither pole) so cold start promotes nothing; prior default (1,1). Internally low_sample/concentration guards EXCLUDE the signal rather than feeding a neutral prior into a posterior.

question: B-003-trust-promotion
claim: Distinct-attester corroboration before live flip: one vote per source, posterior settles toward attester quality and can't be pushed to certainty by count; distinct-author guard (an agent can't vote up its own reliability). heldOutValidationRequired flag exists but no gate consumes it; shadow-delta sink is the holdout data already collected.

question: B-003-trust-promotion
claim: Promotion reversible: decayed support demotes a promoted lane weight; stable id re-promotes on regained support; audit tags keep 'support went bad' apart from 'lost support'. No revert path today (liveWeightsFrozen:true, no demotion machinery).

question: B-003-trust-promotion
claim: Asymmetric weight movement: corrections sink weight harder than acceptances raise it (down>=up), gain settable to zero (decay-only), never-ratcheted sink-only cap. Today (acceptancePressure-correctionPressure)*MAX_WEIGHT_DELTA is a symmetric single clamp.

question: B-003-trust-promotion
claim: Append-only event log is source of truth, cache derived; folding order-independent (Beta increments commute), events content-addressed so replay/double-delivery folds to the same number (no read-modify-write race). Determinism hardening C4 needs before going live.

question: B-003-trust-promotion
claim: These 6 directly CLOSE the Round-A C4 refutation gap: the estimator already emits a proposal; the missing promotion gate = two-gate (k>=2 AND posterior, reachability-refusal) + cold-start-neutral prior + held-out attestation + reversible decay-demotion. C4 is now an actionable build spec, not a graduation. newInfoRatio 0.75.
evidence: B5 seat; feedback-calibration.ts:222-238 (proposal exists, gate absent)
